Text.Page:
We have the jurisdiction of Frost Wastes, Deathfrost Plains, and Batia’s Hulk. That's a lot of ground to cover, and we don't have nearly the bandwidth for it.

Ask {@LinkCreature:231#1008$$Pedr} when the fleet we were promised will arrive. If I do it, I'm likely to rip his head off. If I hear the words "any day now" one more time...

Boy am I glad to see you and not {@LinkCreature:231#1023$$Ghauth}. He's not the most patient person, but I understand. He carries a lot of stress around.

The federation fleet will arrive any day now, and he can rest easy when it does. Tell him there’s nothing to worry about.

I could kill him, but I'll hold off for now and just shove him on a spit when we run out of rations.

That fleet will arrive about the time everyone here has been eaten by ruthless monsters or frozen to death.
